series_metadata.series_description: A request made pursuant to ORC Section 4301.22 by a member of the immediate family of a person who habitually drinks alcoholic beverages to excess, or by someone dependent upon such person for support, or by the mayor of township trustee, requesting that this person not be sold intoxicating liquor. The record also includes the Division''s decision and notifications. (fna PM-212)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: diazo copy i office area permanently. master microfilm in off site storage permanently. ; Paper: in office area current year or all hearings are held
